mapper.select: SELECT mg.id::text AS id, mg.group_code AS "groupCode", mg.group_name AS "groupName", mg.description, mg.use_yn AS "useYn", mg.sort_order AS "sortOrder", mg.created_at AS "createdAt", mg.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM menu_group mg WHERE mg.group_code = #{groupCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_group (group_code, group_name, description, use_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_at) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), ${createdBy}, NOW() ) RETURNING id::text, group_code AS "groupCode", group_name AS "groupName", description, use_yn AS "useYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"

INSERT INTO menu (group_id, parent_id, menu_code, menu_name, path, icon, roles, target, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_at) VALUES ( ${groupId}, ${parentId}, #{menuCode}, #{menuName}, #{path}, #{icon}, ${roles}, COALESCE(#{target}, '_self'), COALESCE(#{activeYn}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), ${createdBy}, NOW() ) RETURNING id::text, group_id::text AS "groupId", parent_id::text AS "parentId", menu_code AS "menuCode", menu_name AS "menuName", path, icon, roles, target, active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.update:
UPDATE menu
menu_name = #{menuName}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, roles = ${roles}, target = #{target}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING id::text, group_id::text AS "groupId", parent_id::text AS "parentId", menu_code AS "menuCode", menu_name AS "menuName", path, icon, roles, target, active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
